title: Chapter 46
content:
Chapter 46: Chapter 46: A Little Cat

Damon looks at the cat full of confusion.

"Why there is a cat here?"

The he activated his Incubus eyes.

[???? Tiger Cub]

[Cultivation: ????]

"It’s a tiger cub? And why question mark?"

Damon shocked to find a tiger cub a size of a cat inside a cage at that. But he could feel the spiritual energy leaking from it, it’s stronger than anything that he ever felt.

"System, what should I do with this?"

[Host, should buy spiritual beast tamer memories, it contains all information about spiritual beast and beast taming.]

"Spiritual Beast? Not a monster? What the difference?"

[Spiritual Beasts have Intelligence almost like human, while monsters don’t. Spiritual Beast cultivates like human while monsters the grow naturally by absorbing spiritual energy environment. And once Spiritual Beasts reach certain realm they can transform into humanoid form.]

"I see. Since I can tame it let’s do it. buy me the beast tamer memories."

[Are you sure host? It cost 100,000 lust points.]

"What the fuck? why is so expensive?"

[It’s because the memories do not contain experience like sword master memories. it contains all information about spiritual beast species, how to bond, behavior, and more. Also, unlike the sword master memories there is no stage like grandmaster, king or higher.]

"So, it’s one and done?"

[Yes, host.]

"Hmm... Okay buy it, there is no harm for having more knowledge and i can gain more points later any way."

[You bought Spiritual Beasts Tamer Memories, -100,000 lust points.]

A torrent of memories slammed into his mind slowly, the sheer volume of it leaving his skull feeling as though it were splitting apart. But Damon already used to it and it not as hurt as the grand master memories.

One hour went by...

Finally, all the memories finish put inside Damon mind, he let out an exhausted sigh.

"Wow, that was long, and the sword master memories transfer didn’t take this long, but then it’s more like I have library full of beast information in my head than a memory."

Then he looks at the little cat or the tiger cub, now he knows what it is. it was a divine beast not a spiritual beast. The Heavenly White Tiger. The Divine beast of thunder.

He let out a sigh.

’100k wasted.’

A divine beast cannot be tame, only can be bond with mutual trust, so knowing this he decides to give up on taming.

Heavenly White Tiger grow differently, they stay in the cub state even million years pass, they only start to grow by absorbing heavenly tribulation lightning.

That’s why it called Heavenly White Tiger, because it was the only beast that can control heavenly tribulation lightning.

Damon doesn’t know why a Heavenly White Tiger Cub in this place but now he now knows why the flame tiger have higher cultivation than what the twin knows and why there is an ancient flame tiger.

They were feeding from the leaked out spiritual energy that the heavenly tiger had.

Looking at the little cat again he felt bad, he should help it out for now. A divine beast shouldn’t be in a cage.

Damon slowly walks towards where the Tiger cub cage.

After noticing Damon presence, the tiger raised its head to look at Damon with bright eyes pleading eyes.

"Are you okay? Wait a minute, I will let you out."

Hearing what Damon said, it let out a sound and nodded it head excitedly.

"Meow!"

Hearing that Damon got confused.

’Meow? So, it is a cat? Isn’t a tiger sound more like Rawr? There is no record like this in the beast tamer memories...’

’Whatever tiger just a big cat, they are the same.’

Then Damon tried to open the lock with force, but it won’t budge, he tried using sword qi, sword intent even sword aura, to destroy the lock, it still not open.

Then when he tries using his lightning using Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art, it suddenly open.

’Huh?’

Hearing the click the little cat burst out through the cage door. It started to jump, stretch and roll happily.

Looking At this Damon smile and spoke.

"You should be fine now; you should go back to your place. See yaa." Damon turns around and began to walk away.

However, when Damon was halfway to the outside, a small figure appeared in front of him out of thin air like a real ghost.

The Tiger cub had placed itself in his path to block him.

"Well? What do you want?" he then said to it.

"Meow!"

Although the Tiger cub couldn’t speak, its gaze was filled with the desire to communicate, as it has never seen a human being.

Ever since it remembers it always inside the cage, one day out of the blue, hundreds of years ago and without memories prior to this place, all it’s see was a flame tiger who come in and out the cave.

It’s can’t communicate with the flame tiger since the don’t have an Intelligence. Now it’s trapped in the cage and have nothing to do.

It’s been looking for a purpose in its life. it’s even tries to escape multiple times but it’s effort futile.

Then one day a human show up and help it escape the cage that have been its prison for hundred years.

The Tiger Cub meowed at Damon, almost like it want to tell him something.

"You are already free, you should go," he said calmly.

But the Ghost Cat refused and continued to block his path.

"..."

"What do you want then?" he asks.

The tiger cub stood there silently, its gaze still fixated on Damon, seemingly in deep thoughts.

In her hundred years of existence and existing memories, the Tiger cub has never felt happy and grateful towards another being.

And there’s just something about him that’s making the cub unable to take its eyes away.

What’s more, when felt the lightning from Damon, it gave off a divine feeling, and such a feeling had made her body shiver with excitement.

The Tiger Cub wanted to know more of this mysterious feeling. It’s wanting to ask Damon, but it don’t know how.

Suddenly, like it’d been struck by a bolt of enlightenment, a thought appeared in its mind, and its silver eyes flickered with a bright light.

A few moments later, when the Tiger Cub resolved itself, jump toward Damon.

"Hm?" Damon startled with sudden movement and catch it with his arm.

Then suddenly the tiger cub bite Damon finger, he felt a sharp pain on his finger.

Though, despite the pain, he didn’t move just stare at it. Then a ding can be heard.

[Ding!]

[The Heavenly White Tiger Initiating Eternal Bond.]
